FROM races r
INNER JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
WHERE c.country LIKE 'M%'
  AND c.name NOT LIKE '%International%'

WITH CardPrintCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        name,
        COUNT(*) AS Prints,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
    FROM cards
    GROUP BY name
),
Top3 AS (
    SELECT name, Prints
    FROM CardPrintCounts
    WHERE rn <= 3
),
OthersAgg AS (
    SELECT 
        'Others' AS name,
        SUM(Prints) AS Prints
    FROM CardPrintCounts
    WHERE rn > 3
)
SELECT name, Prints FROM Top3
UNION ALL
SELECT name, Prints FROM OthersAgg
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN name = 'Others' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    Prints DESC

SELECT 
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    c.atom_id2 AS connected_atom_id,
    a2.element AS connected_atom_element
FROM atom a
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR000'
ORDER BY a.atom_id, b.bond_id

WITH hero_activity AS
  (SELECT id,
          activity_date,
          activity_value,
          hero_id
   FROM (
         VALUES (1, '2023-01-01', 10, 1),
                (2, '2023-01-02', 20, 1),
                (3, '2023-02-01', 15, 1),
                (4, '2023-02-02', 25, 1),
                (5, '2023-01-03', 30, 2),
                (6, '2023-02-03', 40, 2)
        ) AS t (id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id)),
     monthly_totals AS
  (SELECT YEAR(activity_date) AS yr,
          MONTH(activity_date) AS mnth,
          SUM(activity_value) AS month_total
   FROM hero_activity
   GROUP BY YEAR(activity_date),
            MONTH(activity_date)),
     monthly_with_prev AS
  (SELECT yr,
          mnth,
          month_total,
          LAG(month_total) OVER (ORDER BY yr, mnth) AS prev_month_total
   FROM monthly_totals),
     activity_with_months AS
  (SELECT ha.id,
          ha.activity_date,
          ha.activity_value,
          YEAR(ha.activity_date) AS yr,
          MONTH(ha.activity_date) AS mnth
   FROM hero_activity ha)
SELECT awm.id,
       awm.activity_date,
       awm.activity_value,
       SUM(awm.activity_value) OVER (ORDER BY awm.activity_date) AS run_tot,
       SUM(awm.activity_value) OVER (PARTITION BY awm.yr, awm.mnth ORDER BY awm.activity_date) AS m_run_tot,
       COALESCE(mwp.prev_month_total, 0) AS required_output
FROM activity_with_months awm
LEFT JOIN monthly_with_prev mwp
       ON awm.yr = mwp.yr AND awm.mnth = mwp.mnth
ORDER BY awm.activity_date

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.name AS raceName,
        c.name AS circuitName,
        d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS driverName,
        d.forename AS driverForename,
        d.surname AS driverSurname,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.year ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS seasonRanking,
        res.driverId,
        res.constructorId,
        res.position AS finishPosition,
        res.points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.constructorId ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS constructorDriverRank
    FROM races AS r
    INNER JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
ConstructorPerformance AS (
    SELECT
        constructorId,
        AVG(CAST(points AS FLOAT)) AS avgPoints,
        COUNT(DISTINCT raceId) AS raceCount
    FROM results
    GROUP BY constructorId
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT raceId) > 5
)

SELECT
    rr.raceId,
    rr.raceName,
    rr.circuitName,
    rr.driverForename,
    rr.driverSurname,
    co.name AS constructorName,
    rr.finishPosition,
    rr.points,
    rr.seasonRanking,
    cp.avgPoints AS constructorAvgPoints,
    CASE
        WHEN rr.constructorDriverRank = 1 THEN 'Primary'
        ELSE 'Secondary'
    END AS driverStatus
FROM RaceResults AS rr
INNER JOIN constructors AS co ON co.constructorId = rr.constructorId
LEFT JOIN ConstructorPerformance AS cp ON cp.constructorId = rr.constructorId
WHERE rr.constructorDriverRank <= 2
ORDER BY
    rr.raceId,
    rr.finishPosition

SELECT c.atom_id AS atom_id1,
       c.atom_id2 AS atom_id2,
       b.bond_id,
       b.bond_type
FROM connected AS c
JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY c.atom_id,
         c.atom_id2

WITH LabWithLastNonNull AS (
    SELECT 
        ID,
        Date,
        GOT,
        MAX(CASE WHEN GOT IS NOT NULL THEN Date END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ID 
            ORDER BY Date 
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS last_non_null_date
    FROM Laboratory
)
SELECT 
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    COALESCE(l.GOT, l2.GOT) AS GOT
FROM LabWithLastNonNull l
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l2 
    ON l.ID = l2.ID 
    AND l.last_non_null_date = l2.Date

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT
        P.ID AS PATIENTID,
        P.SEX,
        P.[Birthday],
        E.[Examination Date],
        E.[Diagnosis],
        E.[Thrombosis],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY P.ID ORDER BY E.[Examination Date]) AS ExamRank
    FROM [Patient] AS P
    LEFT JOIN [Examination] AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        L.ID,
        L.PLT,
        L.WBC,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY L.ID ORDER BY L.[Date] DESC) AS LabRank
    FROM [Laboratory] AS L
    WHERE L.[Date] <= GETDATE()
),
PatientRiskProfile AS (
    SELECT
        PED.PATIENTID,
        PED.SEX,
        PED.[Birthday],
        PED.[Examination Date],
        PED.[Diagnosis],
        PED.[Thrombosis],
        CASE
            WHEN LLR.PLT < 150 OR LLR.WBC > 11 THEN 'High'
            WHEN PED.[Thrombosis] IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            ELSE 'Normal'
        END AS RiskCategory
    FROM PatientExamData PED
    LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults LLR ON PED.PATIENTID = LLR.ID AND LLR.LabRank = 1
)

SELECT
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    [Birthday],
    COUNT([Examination Date]) AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN [Thrombosis] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN [Thrombosis] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT,
    MAX(CASE WHEN RiskCategory = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighRiskFlag
FROM PatientRiskProfile
WHERE [Examination Date] IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    PATIENTID,
    SEX,
    [Birthday]
HAVING COUNT([Examination Date]) > 0
ORDER BY
    SUM(CASE WHEN [Thrombosis] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC,
    PATIENTID

WITH data AS (
    SELECT
        county,
        cdscode,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
),
county_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        a.cdscode AS cdscode1,
        a.county AS county1,
        b.cdscode AS cdscode2,
        b.county AS county2,
        a.rnk AS rnk1,
        b.rnk AS rnk2
    FROM data AS a
    LEFT JOIN data AS b ON
        a.county = b.county AND
        b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
    WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1
),
filtered_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        cp.*,
        CASE
            WHEN cp.cdscode1 < cp.cdscode2 THEN 'Ascending'
            WHEN cp.cdscode1 > cp.cdscode2 THEN 'Descending'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS comparison_result
    FROM county_pairs cp
    WHERE cp.rnk2 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    cdscode1,
    county1,
    cdscode2,
    county2,
    comparison_result
FROM filtered_pairs
ORDER BY county1, rnk1

SELECT
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id AS atom1_id,
    a1.element AS atom1_element,
    a2.atom_id AS atom2_id,
    a2.element AS atom2_element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM connected AS c
INNER JOIN atom AS a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE
    a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY
    a1.molecule_id,
    a1.atom_id,
    a2.atom_id

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label AS molecule_label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element AS atom_element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM molecule AS m
INNER JOIN atom AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

SELECT *
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule_id IS NOT NULL
  AND molecule_id NOT IN ('TR000', 'TR001', 'TR002')

SELECT
    FORMAT([date], 'yyyy-MM') AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT [date]) AS distinct_days,
    COUNT(*) AS total_rulings,
    MIN([date]) AS first_ruling_date
FROM rulings
GROUP BY FORMAT([date], 'yyyy-MM'), YEAR([date]), MONTH([date])
ORDER BY YEAR([date]), MONTH([date])

SELECT
    s.id AS superhero_id,
    s.superhero_name,
    COALESCE(g.gender, 'N/A') AS gender
FROM superhero s
LEFT JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
ORDER BY s.id

ALTER TABLE [Patient] ADD DiagnosisValues AS (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT([Diagnosis], ','));
CREATE INDEX IX_Patient_Diagnosis ON [Patient]([ID]) INCLUDE ([Diagnosis])

ALTER TABLE superhero ADD height_cm INT NULL;
ALTER TABLE superhero ADD weight_kg INT NULL

WITH PatientExamHistory AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Birthday,
        p.Description,
        p.[First Date],
        p.Admission,
        p.Diagnosis AS PatientDiagnosis,
        e.[Examination Date],
        e.[aCL IgG],
        e.[aCL IgM],
        e.ANA,
        e.[ANA Pattern],
        e.[aCL IgA],
        e.Diagnosis AS ExamDiagnosis,
        e.KCT,
        e.RVVT,
        e.LAC,
        e.Symptoms,
        e.Thrombosis,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID ORDER BY e.[Examination Date] DESC) AS ExamRank,
        COUNT(e.ID) OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Patient AS p
    LEFT JOIN Examination AS e ON e.ID = p.ID
    WHERE (p.SEX = 'F' OR e.Thrombosis = 1)
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.WBC,
        l.RBC,
        l.HGB,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LabRank
    FROM Laboratory AS l
)
SELECT
    peh.*,
    llr.WBC,
    llr.RBC,
    llr.HGB,
    CASE
        WHEN peh.ExamCount > 1 THEN 'Multiple Exams'
        WHEN peh.ExamCount = 1 THEN 'Single Exam'
        ELSE 'No Exams'
    END AS ExamStatus
FROM PatientExamHistory peh
LEFT JOIN LatestLabResults llr ON llr.ID = peh.ID AND llr.LabRank = 1
WHERE peh.ExamRank = 1 OR peh.ExamRank IS NULL
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN peh.Thrombosis = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    peh.ID

WITH LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LatestRank
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
),
PatientDiagnosis AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HasSLE
    FROM Examination
    GROUP BY ID
)
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
    l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
    l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
    l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
    l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II]
FROM LabResults l
LEFT JOIN PatientDiagnosis pd ON l.ID = pd.ID
WHERE l.LatestRank = 1 OR (pd.HasSLE = 1 AND l.LatestRank <= 3)
ORDER BY l.ID, l.Date DESC

WITH LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        l.Date,
        l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
        l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
        l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
        l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
        l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY l.ID ORDER BY l.Date DESC) AS LatestRank
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE p.SEX = 'F'
),
PatientDiagnosis AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HasSLE
    FROM Examination
    GROUP BY ID
)
SELECT
    l.ID,
    l.Date,
    l.GOT, l.GPT, l.LDH, l.ALP, l.TP, l.ALB, l.UA, l.UN, l.CRE,
    l.[T-BIL], l.[T-CHO], l.TG, l.CPK, l.GLU, l.WBC, l.RBC, l.HGB,
    l.HCT, l.PLT, l.PT, l.APTT, l.FG, l.[U-PRO], l.IGG, l.IGA, l.IGM,
    l.CRP, l.RA, l.RF, l.C3, l.C4, l.RNP, l.SM, l.SC170, l.SSA, l.SSB,
    l.CENTROMEA, l.DNA, l.[DNA-II]
FROM LabResults l
LEFT JOIN PatientDiagnosis pd ON l.ID = pd.ID
WHERE l.LatestRank = 1 
   OR (pd.HasSLE = 1 AND l.LatestRank <= 3)
ORDER BY l.ID, l.Date DESC

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.date,
        res.driverId,
        res.points,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId, r.year ORDER BY r.date) AS SeasonRaceNumber,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId ORDER BY r.year, r.date) AS CareerRaceNumber
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        year,
        raceId,
        points,
        SeasonRaceNumber,
        CareerRaceNumber
    FROM RaceResults
    WHERE CareerRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT
    d.driverId,
    d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS DriverName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN points END) AS Race1_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN points END) AS Race3_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 4 THEN points END) AS Race4_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 5 THEN points END) AS Race5_Points
FROM DriverFirstFiveRaces r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY d.surname, d.forename

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.name AS raceName,
        res.positionText,
        d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS driverName,
        res.driverId,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.positionText ORDER BY res.resultId) AS position_rank
    FROM results res
    INNER JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE CAST(res.positionText AS INT) <= 3
)
SELECT
    rr.raceId,
    MAX(rr.year) AS year,
    MAX(rr.raceName) AS raceName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position1_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position2_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3
FROM RaceResults rr
WHERE position_rank = 1
GROUP BY rr.raceId
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC, rr.raceId

WITH x AS
  (SELECT driverid,
          statusid,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY driverid
                             ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
   FROM results
   GROUP BY driverid,
            statusid)
INSERT INTO results (resultId, raceId, driverId, constructorId, number, grid, position, positionText, positionOrder, points, laps, time, milliseconds, fastestLap, rank, fastestLapTime, fastestLapSpeed, statusId)
SELECT 
    (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(resultId), 0) + 1 FROM results) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY driverid),
    1, 
    driverid,
    1, 
    1, 
    1, 
    1,
    '1',
    1,
    0,
    1, 
    '00:00:00', 
    0, 
    1, 
    1, 
    '00:00:00', 
    '000.000', 
    statusid
FROM x
WHERE rn = 1

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            ELSE nationality
        END AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN
            min_code + '-' + max_code
        ELSE
            max_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT
        ISNULL(nationality, 'Unknown') AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN CONCAT(min_code, '-', max_code)
        ELSE min_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(CAST(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgBuildupplaySpeed,
        AVG(CAST(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
    WHERE BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
      AND DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
),
RankedTeams AS (
    SELECT
        TA.ID,
        TA.TEAM_API_ID,
        TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
        TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
        TA.DEFENCEPRESSURE,
        TA.DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
        TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TA.TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY TA.DATE DESC) AS LatestRecord
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES AS TA
    WHERE TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
      AND TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    RT.ID,
    RT.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    RT.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    RT.CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
    RT.CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
    RT.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    RT.DEFENCEPRESSURE,
    RT.DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
    RT.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH
FROM RankedTeams AS RT
CROSS JOIN TeamAverages AS AVG
WHERE RT.LatestRecord = 1
  AND RT.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED > AVG.AvgBuildupplaySpeed
  AND RT.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH < AVG.AvgDefenceTeamWidth
ORDER BY RT.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED DESC, RT.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH ASC

WITH TeamEvolution AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        TEAM_API_ID,
        DATE,
        BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
        BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
        DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
        CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
        -- LEAD() to find next values for each team
        LEAD(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS NextBuildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(BUILDUPPLAYPASSING) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS NextBuildUpPlayPassing,
        -- LAG() to find previous values for each team
        LAG(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS PrevDefenceTeamWidth,
        LAG(CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID ORDER BY DATE) AS PrevChanceCreationShooting,
        -- COUNT() to get number of records per team
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TEAM_API_ID) AS TeamRecordCount
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
)
SELECT
    ID,
    TEAM_API_ID,
    DATE,
    BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
    CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    NextBuildUpPlaySpeed,
    NextBuildUpPlayPassing,
    PrevDefenceTeamWidth,
    PrevChanceCreationShooting,
    TeamRecordCount
FROM TeamEvolution
WHERE 
    TeamRecordCount > 1
    AND PrevDefenceTeamWidth > BUILDUPPLAYSPEED

WITH PatientTestDates AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Diagnosis,
        l.Date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID ORDER BY l.Date) AS RowNum
    FROM Patient p
    LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.Date >= p.[First Date] OR p.[First Date] IS NULL
),
ExaminationDates AS (
    SELECT
        p.ID,
        MIN(e.[Examination Date]) AS earliest_exam_date
    FROM Patient p
    LEFT JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
    GROUP BY p.ID
)
SELECT
    ptd.ID,
    ptd.SEX,
    ptd.Diagnosis,
    CASE
        WHEN ptd.Date < ed.earliest_exam_date OR ed.earliest_exam_date IS NULL
        THEN ptd.Date
        ELSE ed.earliest_exam_date
    END AS earliest_test_date
FROM PatientTestDates ptd
LEFT JOIN ExaminationDates ed ON ptd.ID = ed.ID
WHERE ptd.RowNum = 1

WITH cte AS
  (SELECT [ID],
          [Examination Date],
          thrombosis,
          risklag = LAG(thrombosis, 1, thrombosis) OVER (PARTITION BY [ID]
                                                         ORDER BY [Examination Date]), 
          rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [ID],
                                               YEAR([Examination Date]),
                                               MONTH([Examination Date])
                                  ORDER BY [Examination Date] DESC)
   FROM Examination)
SELECT [ID],
       startofmonth = DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, [Examination Date]), 0),
       increase_risk = CASE
                           WHEN risklag < thrombosis THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END,
       decrease_risk = CASE
                           WHEN risklag > thrombosis THEN 'Yes'
                           ELSE 'No'
                       END
FROM cte
WHERE rn = 1
  AND risklag <> thrombosis

WITH x AS
  (SELECT FLOOR(COALESCE(LEN(label), 0) / 100.0) AS labellength
   FROM [molecule])
SELECT labellength * 100 AS labellengthstart,
       (labellength + 1) * 100 - 1 AS labellengthend,
       COUNT(*) AS moleculecount
FROM x
GROUP BY labellength
ORDER BY labellength

WITH t AS
  (SELECT e.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id
                             ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS seqnum
   FROM examination AS e),
     cte AS
  (SELECT t.id,
          t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
          t.seqnum,
          'N' AS isrehire,
          t.[Examination Date] AS anchordate
   FROM t
   WHERE t.seqnum = 1
   UNION ALL SELECT t.id,
                    t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
                    t.seqnum,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                    END AS isrehire,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN t.[Examination Date]
                        ELSE cte.anchordate
                    END AS anchordate
   FROM cte
   INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1)
SELECT id,
       startdate,
       seqnum,
       isrehire
FROM cte
ORDER BY id,
         startdate

WITH MoleculeList AS (
    SELECT value AS molecule_id
    FROM STRING_SPLIT('TR000,TR001,TR002', ',')
),
MoleculeStats AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS unique_bond_types,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC) AS size_rank
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    ml.molecule_id,
    ms.label,
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.unique_bond_types,
    CASE
        WHEN ms.size_rank = 1 THEN 'Largest'
        WHEN ms.size_rank <= 3 THEN 'Top 3'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS size_category
FROM MoleculeList ml
LEFT JOIN MoleculeStats ms ON ml.molecule_id = ms.molecule_id
WHERE ms.atom_count > (SELECT AVG(atom_count) FROM MoleculeStats)
   OR ms.molecule_id IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT('TR000,TR001', ','))

SELECT *
FROM
(
    SELECT
        id,
        name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY label) AS item,
        CONCAT(label, ' (', tag1, ')') AS value
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'Colors' AS label,
            colors   AS tag1
        FROM cards
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            id,
            name,
            'ManaCost' AS label,
            manacost   AS tag1
        FROM cards
    ) AS src
) AS src
PIVOT
(
    MAX(value)
    FOR item IN ([1], [2])
) AS pvt
WHERE id = 1

WITH T_period_futur AS
  (SELECT 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          CAST('2021-10-25' AS DATE) AS Tpf_start_period
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT Tpf_period_id + 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          DATEADD(WEEK, 1, Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_start_period
   FROM T_period_futur
   WHERE Tpf_period_id < 12)
SELECT Tpf_period_id,
       Tpf_start_period,
       YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_year,
       CAST(YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '.' + RIGHT('00' + CAST(DATEPART(WK, Tpf_start_period) AS VARCHAR(2)), 2) AS Tpf_period_number,
       DATEADD(DAY, 6, Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_end_period
FROM T_period_futur
OPTION (MAXRECURSION 100)

WITH PatientThrombosisHistory AS (
    SELECT
        e.ID,
        e.Thrombosis,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.ID ORDER BY e.[Examination Date] DESC) AS RecencyRank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY e.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Examination e
),
LabResults AS (
    SELECT
        l.ID,
        AVG(l.PLT) AS AvgPlateletCount,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.PLT < 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HasLowPlatelets
    FROM Laboratory l
    WHERE l.Date >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())
    GROUP BY l.ID
)
SELECT
    p.ID AS PatientID,
    p.Diagnosis,
    CASE
        WHEN lr.HasLowPlatelets = 1 AND pth.Thrombosis IS NULL THEN 1
        WHEN pth.ExamCount > 1 AND pth.Thrombosis IS NULL THEN
            (SELECT TOP 1 e2.Thrombosis
             FROM Examination e2
             WHERE e2.ID = p.ID
               AND e2.Thrombosis IS NOT NULL
             ORDER BY e2.[Examination Date] DESC)
        ELSE COALESCE(pth.Thrombosis, 0)
    END AS ThrombosisStatus,
    lr.AvgPlateletCount
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN PatientThrombosisHistory pth ON p.ID = pth.ID AND pth.RecencyRank = 1
LEFT JOIN LabResults lr ON p.ID = lr.ID
ORDER BY p.ID

WITH TEAMATTRS AS
  (SELECT BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS VALUE,
          'Team_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                             ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED) AS RN
   FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES),
PLAYERATTRS AS
  (SELECT OVERALL_RATING AS VALUE,
          'Player_Attributes' AS IDENTIFIER,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                             ORDER BY OVERALL_RATING) AS RN
   FROM PLAYER_ATTRIBUTES)
SELECT PLAYERATTRS.VALUE AS PLAYER_VALUE,
       PLAYERATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS PLAYER_IDENTIFIER,
       TEAMATTRS.VALUE AS TEAM_VALUE,
       TEAMATTRS.IDENTIFIER AS TEAM_IDENTIFIER
FROM PLAYERATTRS
FULL OUTER JOIN TEAMATTRS ON PLAYERATTRS.RN = TEAMATTRS.RN

WITH weekly_cards AS (
    SELECT
        originalreleasedate,
        -- Calculate Monday of the week (reliable regardless of DATEFIRST setting)
        DATEADD(DAY, 
            -((DATEPART(DW, originalreleasedate) + @@DATEFIRST - 2) % 7), 
            CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)
        ) AS start_of_week,
        -- Calculate week number since Jan 1, 2007 (Monday-based)
        DATEDIFF(WEEK, 
            DATEADD(DAY, 
                -((DATEPART(DW, '2007-01-01') + @@DATEFIRST - 2) % 7), 
                CAST('2007-01-01' AS DATE)
            ),
            DATEADD(DAY, 
                -((DATEPART(DW, originalreleasedate) + @@DATEFIRST - 2) % 7), 
                CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)
            )
        ) + 1 AS week_number
    FROM cards
    WHERE originalreleasedate IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, originalreleasedate) IS NOT NULL
      AND originalreleasedate >= '2007-01-01'
)
SELECT
    start_of_week,
    week_number,
    COUNT(*) AS card_count
FROM weekly_cards
GROUP BY start_of_week, week_number
ORDER BY start_of_week

SELECT [date],
       home_team_api_id AS group_1,
       away_team_api_id AS group_2,
       home_team_goal AS daily_profits,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, CONVERT(DATE, [date])), 
                                              DATEPART(MONTH, CONVERT(DATE, [date])),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, [date]) ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS mtd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, CONVERT(DATE, [date])),
                                              DATEPART(QUARTER, CONVERT(DATE, [date])),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, [date]) ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS qtd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY DATEPART(YEAR, CONVERT(DATE, [date])),
                                              home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, [date]) ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ytd,
       SUM(home_team_goal) OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id,
                                              away_team_api_id
                                 ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, [date]) ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS ltd
FROM [Match]
ORDER BY CONVERT(DATE, [date]),
         home_team_api_id,
         away_team_api_id

WITH CardLegalityDiffs AS (
    SELECT
        c.name AS card_name,
        l.format,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Legal' THEN l.id END) AS legal_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.status = 'Banned' THEN l.id END) AS banned_id
    FROM cards AS c
    JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
    WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
      AND l.status IN ('Legal', 'Banned')
    GROUP BY c.name, l.format
)
SELECT
    card_name,
    format,
    legal_id,
    banned_id,
    legal_id - banned_id AS id_diff
FROM CardLegalityDiffs
ORDER BY card_name ASC, format ASC

WITH filtered_labs AS (
    SELECT id, date
    FROM laboratory
    WHERE id = 27654
),
dated_labs AS (
    SELECT id,
           date AS applicationid,
           LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY date) AS prev,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY date) AS rn
    FROM filtered_labs
)
SELECT id AS usercode,
       prev AS data_1,
       rn - 1 AS id_1,
       applicationid AS data_2,
       rn AS id_2
FROM dated_labs
WHERE prev IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    YEAR,
    RACEID,
    NAME,
    [date],
    ISNULL(LAG(RACEID) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR ORDER BY [date]), -1) AS PREVRACEID,
    ISNULL(LEAD(RACEID) OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR ORDER BY [date]), -1) AS NEXTRACEID
FROM RACES
ORDER BY YEAR, [date]

WITH pages AS
  (SELECT 1 AS page_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 1,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 2,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 3,
                    89
   UNION ALL SELECT 4,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    55
   UNION ALL SELECT 5,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 6,
                    13),
     items AS
  (SELECT 10 AS hero_id,
          1 AS power_id
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    7
   UNION ALL SELECT 10,
                    20
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    1
   UNION ALL SELECT 12,
                    55)
SELECT p.page_id,
       i.hero_id
FROM
  (SELECT p.page_id,
          p.power_id,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.page_id) AS total_powers
   FROM pages AS p) AS p
INNER JOIN items AS i ON p.power_id = i.power_id
GROUP BY p.page_id,
         i.hero_id,
         p.total_powers
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.power_id) >= p.total_powers

WITH data AS
  (SELECT e.id,
          e.[Examination Date] AS as_of_date,
          e.diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
          LAG(e.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY e.id
                                 ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS prev_diagnosis,
          CASE
              WHEN e.diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE') THEN 1
              ELSE 0
          END AS output_flag
   FROM Examination AS e),
filtered AS
  (SELECT as_of_date,
          id,
          current_diagnosis,
          prev_diagnosis,
          output_flag,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id
                             ORDER BY as_of_date) AS rn
   FROM data
   WHERE (current_diagnosis <> prev_diagnosis
          OR prev_diagnosis IS NULL)
     AND output_flag = 1)
SELECT as_of_date,
       id,
       current_diagnosis,
       prev_diagnosis
FROM filtered
WHERE rn = 1
  AND id = 2110

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS
  (SELECT P.ID,
          P.PLAYER_NAME,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%aaron%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Aaron'
          END AS COLAKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%cresswell%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell'
          END AS COLBKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%doran%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Doran'
          END AS COLCKEYWORD
   FROM PLAYER AS P)
SELECT KM.ID,
       KM.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION,
       (CASE WHEN KM.COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 10 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN KM.COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 5 ELSE 0 END +
        CASE WHEN KM.COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 0.1 ELSE 0 END) AS SCORE,
       -- Optional: concatenated keywords for reference
       LTRIM(COALESCE(', ' + KM.COLAKEYWORD, '') +
             COALESCE(', ' + KM.COLBKEYWORD, '') +
             COALESCE(', ' + KM.COLCKEYWORD, ''), ', ') AS MATCHED_KEYWORDS
FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM
WHERE KM.COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
   OR KM.COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
   OR KM.COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY SCORE DESC

WITH ATOMRNS AS
  (SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
          ELEMENT,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY MOLECULE_ID
                             ORDER BY ATOM_ID) AS RN
   FROM ATOM)
SELECT MOLECULE_ID,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 1 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT1,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 2 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT2,
       MAX(CASE
               WHEN RN = 3 THEN ELEMENT
           END) AS ELEMENT3
FROM ATOMRNS
WHERE RN <= 3
GROUP BY MOLECULE_ID

WITH SUPERHERO_RANKED AS (
    SELECT
        ID,
        SUPERHERO_NAME,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID) AS ROW_NUM
    FROM SUPERHERO
)
SELECT
    S1.SUPERHERO_NAME AS CURRENTSUPERHERO,
    S2.SUPERHERO_NAME AS SUPERHEROAFTER4
FROM SUPERHERO_RANKED AS S1
LEFT JOIN SUPERHERO_RANKED AS S2
    ON S2.ROW_NUM = S1.ROW_NUM + 4
ORDER BY S1.ROW_NUM
WHERE TRIM(number) NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%'

SELECT 
    molecule_id,
    MIN(bond_type) AS bond_type
FROM bond
GROUP BY molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) > 1
ORDER BY molecule_id

SELECT "event_id", "event_name", "event_date", "type"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "event_id",
        "event_name",
        "event_date",
        "type",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "type" ORDER BY "event_date" DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
    FROM "event"
)
WHERE rn = 1

select "element", "record"
    from "frpm_record"
    union all

    select
        substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1) || '_rate' as element,
        max(case when "element" like '%highgrade' then "record" end) /
        nullif(max(case when "element" like '%lowgrade' then "record" end), 0) as "record"
    from "frpm_record"
    group by substr("element", 1, instr("element", '_') - 1)
    having max(case when "element" like '%highgrade' then "record" end) is not null
       and max(case when "element" like '%lowgrade' then "record" end) is not null
       and max(case when "element" like '%lowgrade' then "record" end) != 0

SELECT M."id", M."date", M."overall_rating"
FROM "Player_Rate" M
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT "id", MAX("date") AS max_date
    FROM "Player_Rate"
    GROUP BY "id"
) latest ON M."id" = latest."id" AND M."date" = latest.max_date

USING (
    SELECT "CDSCode" 
    FROM "frpm" 
    WHERE "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" >= 0.5
) AS source 
ON (target."CDSCode" = source."CDSCode") 
WHEN MATCHED THEN 
UPDATE SET "Charter School (Y/N)" = 1000
SELECT "id", "date", "home_team_goal", LAG("home_team_goal") OVER (ORDER BY "date") AS prev_home_goal FROM "Match" WHERE "date" <= '2024-02-26'

MERGE INTO "school_record" tab2
USING (
    SELECT "CDSCode" FROM "charter_school" WHERE "Charter School (Y/N)" = '1'
) tab1
ON (tab1."CDSCode" = tab2."CDSCode")
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
