    DELETE

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH("first_name") <= 2 THEN "first_name"
        ELSE SUBSTR("first_name", 1, 1) || REGEXP_REPLACE(SUBSTR("first_name", 2, LENGTH("first_name") - 2), '.', '•') || SUBSTR("first_name", -1, 1)
    END AS masked_first_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH("last_name") <= 2 THEN "last_name"
        ELSE SUBSTR("last_name", 1, 1) || REGEXP_REPLACE(SUBSTR("last_name", 2, LENGTH("last_name") - 2), '.', '•') || SUBSTR("last_name", -1, 1)
    END AS masked_last_name
FROM "member"

SELECT "atom_id",
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_1",
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_2",
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN "bond_id" END) AS "bond_id_3"
FROM (
    SELECT "atom_id", "bond_id",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "atom_id" ORDER BY "bond_id") AS rn
    FROM "connected"
)
WHERE rn <= 3
GROUP BY "atom_id"
ORDER BY "atom_id"

WITH tokenized_members AS (
    SELECT
        a."link_to_event",
        LEVEL AS position,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) AS member_token
    FROM "attendance_trunc" a
    CONNECT BY
        PRIOR a."link_to_event" = a."link_to_event"
        AND PRIOR DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE IS NOT NULL
        AND LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(a."link_to_member", '\|') + 1
        AND a."link_to_event" = a."link_to_event"
),
member_names AS (
    SELECT
        tm."link_to_event",
        tm.position,
        COALESCE(m."member_name", 'Unknown Member') AS member_name
    FROM tokenized_members tm
    LEFT JOIN "member_trunc" m ON tm.member_token = m."member_id"
)
SELECT
    mn."link_to_event",
    LISTAGG(mn.member_name, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mn.position) AS replaced_members
FROM member_names mn
GROUP BY mn."link_to_event"
ORDER BY mn."link_to_event"

delete from "atom"
where "atom_id" in (
    select "atom"."atom_id"
    from "atom"
    inner join "molecule"
    on "atom"."molecule_id" = "molecule"."molecule_id"
    where DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("atom"."element", 4000, 1) <> 'cl'
    and DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("molecule"."label", 4000, 1) = '-'
)

SELECT "cds", 
       TO_CHAR("sname"), 
       (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT(
           'enroll12' VALUE TO_CHAR("enroll12"),
           'NumTstTakr' VALUE TO_CHAR("NumTstTakr"),
           'AvgScrRead' VALUE TO_CHAR("AvgScrRead"),
           'AvgScrMath' VALUE TO_CHAR("AvgScrMath"),
           'AvgScrWrite' VALUE TO_CHAR("AvgScrWrite")
           ) ORDER BY "enroll12" DESC
           RETURNING CLOB) 
        FROM "satscores" t
        WHERE TO_CHAR(t."rtype") = 'S' 
        AND t."cds" = "satscores"."cds"
       ) 
FROM "satscores" 
WHERE TO_CHAR("rtype") = 'S'

WITH OrderedCategories AS (
    SELECT
        SUM("spent") AS category_total,
        DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("category", 4000) AS category
    FROM "budget"
    GROUP BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("category", 4000)
    ORDER BY DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR("category", 4000) DESC
),
Cumulative AS (
    SELECT category_total, category,
           SUM(category_total) OVER (ORDER BY category DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_sum
    FROM OrderedCategories
)
SELECT category_total, category
FROM Cumulative
WHERE cumulative_sum <= 850

SELECT header || ': ' || name AS grouped_countries
FROM (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN name LIKE 'Country Group%' THEN name END)
        OVER (ORDER BY id) AS header,
        id,
        name
    FROM "Country"
)
WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Country Group%'

SELECT
    "type" AS event_type,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date") = recent_year THEN 1 END) -
    COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date") = oldest_year THEN 1 END) AS year_difference
FROM "event",
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS recent_year,
            MIN(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "event_date")) AS oldest_year
        FROM "event"
    ) year_range
GROUP BY "type"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LEAST(m1."home_team_api_id", m1."away_team_api_id") || ',' || GREATEST(m1."home_team_api_id", m1."away_team_api_id"))
FROM "Match" m1
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "Match" m2
    WHERE m2."home_team_api_id" = m1."away_team_api_id"
    AND m2."away_team_api_id" = m1."home_team_api_id"
)

SELECT player_id,
    overall_rating,
    potential,
    preferred_foot,
    attacking_work_rate
FROM (SELECT player_api_id AS player_id, overall_rating, potential, preferred_foot, attacking_work_rate, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) as rn FROM Player_Attributes WHERE date <= '2015-12-31') subquery
WHERE rn = 1

SELECT [District Name], CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(REVERSE('Unified'), REVERSE([District Name]), 3) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LEN([District Name]) - CHARINDEX(REVERSE('Unified'), REVERSE([District Name]), 3) - 5 END AS Position FROM frpm

SELECT DISTINCT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.atom_id2) OVER (PARTITION BY a.atom_id) AS cnt
FROM atom a
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE a.atom_id IN (SELECT COLUMN_VALUE FROM TABLE(NEW atom_tab('TR000_1', 'TR000_2')) tab)

SELECT frpm.*
FROM frpm
LEFT OUTER JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds AND satscores.cds = '01100170112607'
LEFT OUTER JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode AND schools.CDSCode = '01100170112607'
WHERE frpm.Charter = 1
AND COALESCE(frpm."District Code", 0) = 10017
AND (satscores.cds IS NOT NULL OR schools.CDSCode IS NOT NULL)

SELECT
    "player_fifa_api_id" AS id,
    TO_DATE('2000-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS gap_start,
    MIN("date") AS gap_end,
    'before_first_active' AS gap_type
FROM "Player_Attributes"
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"
HAVING MIN("date") > TO_DATE('2000-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
UNION ALL
SELECT
    "player_fifa_api_id" AS id,
    MAX("date") AS gap_start,
    TO_DATE('2025-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS gap_end,
    'after_last_active' AS gap_type
FROM "Player_Attributes"
GROUP BY "player_fifa_api_id"
HAVING MAX("date") < TO_DATE('2025-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT * FROM "event"
WHERE "status" != 'Closed'
ORDER BY "event_date"
OFFSET 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

SELECT e."event_id", b."amount", a."link_to_member", a."link_to_event"
FROM "event" e
JOIN "budget" b ON e."event_id" = b."link_to_event"
LEFT JOIN "attendance" a ON e."event_id" = a."link_to_event"
ORDER BY e."event_id"

SELECT sh."id" AS superhero_id,
       sh."superhero_name",
       a."alignment" AS moral_alignment
FROM "superhero" AS sh
JOIN "alignment" AS a ON sh."alignment_id" = a."id"
WHERE a."alignment" LIKE '%Good%'

SELECT t1.week_start, t1.userid, t1.total_traffic, t2.location
FROM (
    SELECT TRUNC(tk.eventdate, 'IW') AS week_start, 
           tk.userid, 
           SUM(tk.traffic) AS total_traffic
    FROM school_events tk
    GROUP BY TRUNC(tk.eventdate, 'IW'), tk.userid
) t1
JOIN (
    SELECT userid, week_start, location
    FROM (
        SELECT tk2.userid,
               TRUNC(tk2.eventdate, 'IW') AS week_start,
               tk2.location,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk2.userid, TRUNC(tk2.eventdate, 'IW') ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
        FROM school_events tk2
        GROUP BY tk2.userid, TRUNC(tk2.eventdate, 'IW'), tk2.location
    )
    WHERE rn = 1
) t2 ON t1.userid = t2.userid AND t1.week_start = t2.week_start
UPDATE record SET (r1, r2) = (SELECT uuid, uuid FROM (SELECT sys_guid() AS uuid FROM dual))

INSERT INTO groups (room_guid, user_guid)
SELECT l.guid, g.user_guid
FROM login l
JOIN login l2 ON l.login = l2.login AND l.name = l2.name AND l.guid != l2.guid
JOIN groups g ON l2.guid = g.room_guid
WHERE l.guid NOT IN (SELECT room_guid FROM groups)
AND l2.guid IN (SELECT room_guid FROM groups)

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION FIND_TEST_TABLE_COLUMN(IN_COLUMN1 TEST_TABLE.COLUMN1%TYPE, IN_COLUMN2 TEST_TABLE.COLUMN2%TYPE, IN_COLUMN3 TEST_TABLE.COLUMN3%TYPE, IN_COLUMN4 TEST_TABLE.COLUMN4%TYPE, IN_REQUESTED_COLUMN VARCHAR2) RETURN VARCHAR2 IS C_TEST_TABLE SYS_REFCURSOR;RESULT VARCHAR2(255);C_TEST_TABLE_REC TEST_TABLE%ROWTYPE;BEGIN IF IN_COLUMN4 IS NULL THEN OPEN C_TEST_TABLE FOR SELECT * FROM TEST_TABLE WHERE COLUMN1 = IN_COLUMN1 AND COLUMN2 = IN_COLUMN2 AND COLUMN3 = IN_COLUMN3;ELSIF IN_COLUMN4 IS NOT NULL THEN OPEN C_TEST_TABLE FOR SELECT * FROM TEST_TABLE WHERE COLUMN1 = IN_COLUMN1 AND COLUMN2 = IN_COLUMN2 AND COLUMN3 = IN_COLUMN3 AND COLUMN4 = IN_COLUMN4;END IF;LOOP FETCH C_TEST_TABLE INTO C_TEST_TABLE_REC;EXIT WHEN C_TEST_TABLE%NOTFOUND;IF IN_REQUESTED_COLUMN = 'COLUMN1' THEN RESULT := C_TEST_TABLE_REC.COLUMN1;EXIT;ELSIF IN_REQUESTED_COLUMN = 'COLUMN2' THEN RESULT := C_TEST_TABLE_REC.COLUMN2;EXIT;ELSIF IN_REQUESTED_COLUMN = 'COLUMN3' THEN RESULT := C_TEST_TABLE_REC.COLUMN3;EXIT;ELSIF IN_REQUESTED_COLUMN = 'COLUMN4' THEN RESULT := C_TEST_TABLE_REC.COLUMN4;EXIT;END IF;END LOOP;CLOSE C_TEST_TABLE;RETURN RESULT;END

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS bond_year
    FROM "BOND_LIST"
    WHERE "TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT y.bond_year, br."BOND_TYPE", br."BOND_SEQ"
    FROM years y
    CROSS JOIN "BOND_REF" br
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS bond_year,
        bl."BOND_TYPE",
        COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM "BOND_LIST" bl
    WHERE bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl."TRANSACT_DT_TM"), bl."BOND_TYPE"
)
SELECT 
    ac.bond_year AS "year",
    ac."BOND_TYPE" AS bond_type,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS bond_count
FROM all_combinations ac
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc 
    ON ac.bond_year = bc.bond_year 
    AND ac."BOND_TYPE" = bc."BOND_TYPE"
ORDER BY 
    ac.bond_year, 
    ac."BOND_SEQ"

WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT id, enroll_date, total_employees,
           id - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS grp
    FROM employee
    WHERE total_employees > 100
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT id, enroll_date, total_employees, grp,
           COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY grp) AS grp_size
    FROM filtered
)
SELECT id, enroll_date, total_employees
FROM grouped
WHERE grp_size >= 3
ORDER BY id

SELECT "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", NVL("2020",0) + NVL("2021",0) + NVL("2022",0) + NVL("2023",0) + NVL("2024",0) AS total_5yr, (SELECT SUM(payment_sum) FROM FEE) AS grand_total FROM (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM payment_date) AS yr, payment_sum FROM FEE) PIVOT (SUM(payment_sum) FOR yr IN (2020 AS "2020", 2021 AS "2021", 2022 AS "2022", 2023 AS "2023", 2024 AS "2024"))
SELECT SUBSTR(STANDARD_HASH(product_id, 'MD5'), 1, 8) AS hash_value, LENGTH(SUBSTR(STANDARD_HASH(product_id, 'MD5'), 1, 8)) AS hash_length FROM products

WITH "atom_hierarchy" ("atom_id", "atom_id2", "bond_id", "level", "path") AS
  (SELECT "atom_id",
          "atom_id2",
          "bond_id",
          1 AS "level",
          "atom_id" || ',' || "atom_id2" AS "path"
   FROM "connected"
   WHERE "atom_id" = 'TR007_8'
   UNION ALL SELECT c."atom_id",
                    c."atom_id2",
                    c."bond_id",
                    ah."level" + 1,
                    ah."path" || ',' || c."atom_id2"
   FROM "connected" c
   JOIN "atom_hierarchy" ah ON c."atom_id" = ah."atom_id2"
   WHERE ah."level" < 10
     AND INSTR(ah."path", c."atom_id2") = 0)
SELECT "atom_id",
       "atom_id2",
       "bond_id",
       "level"
FROM "atom_hierarchy"
ORDER BY "level",
         "atom_id"

SELECT XMLSERIALIZE(DOCUMENT XMLELEMENT("files", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("file", XMLFOREST(t."id" AS "id", t."team_long_name" AS "team_long_name"))
                                                        ORDER BY NLSSORT(t."team_long_name", 'NLS_SORT=XFRENCH'))) INDENT SIZE = 2)
FROM "Team" t
WHERE t."team_api_id" IN
    (SELECT ta."team_api_id"
     FROM "Team_Attributes" ta
     WHERE ta."date" IS NULL)

WITH match_years AS (
    SELECT
        M."league_id",
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date") AS match_year,
        COUNT(*) AS year_count
    FROM "Match" M
    WHERE M."date" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY M."league_id", EXTRACT(YEAR FROM M."date")
),
league_stats AS (
    SELECT
        L."id" AS league_id,
        L."name" AS league_name,
        C."name" AS country_name,
        COUNT(M."id") AS total_matches
    FROM "League" L
    JOIN "Country" C ON L."country_id" = C."id"
    LEFT JOIN "Match" M ON L."id" = M."league_id"
    GROUP BY L."id", L."name", C."name"
)
SELECT
    ls.league_name,
    my.match_year AS "year",
    my.year_count AS match_count,
    ROUND(my.year_count / NULLIF(ls.total_matches, 0) * 100, 2) AS percentage_of_total
FROM match_years my
JOIN league_stats ls ON my."league_id" = ls.league_id
WHERE my.match_year BETWEEN 2008 AND 2016
ORDER BY
    my.match_year,
    ls.league_name

WITH temp AS
  (SELECT a."atom_id",
          a."molecule_id",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id"
                             ORDER BY a."atom_id") - TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$')) AS grp
   FROM "atom" a), temp2 AS
  (SELECT t."atom_id",
          t."molecule_id",
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t."molecule_id", t.grp) AS cnt
   FROM temp t)
SELECT t2."atom_id",
       t2."molecule_id"
FROM temp2 t2
WHERE t2.cnt >= 3
ORDER BY t2."molecule_id",
         t2."atom_id"

SELECT
    school_id,
    first_start,
    MAX(end_date) AS final_end_date
FROM (
    SELECT
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT start_date AS first_start
    FROM (
        SELECT
            school_id,
            start_date,
            end_date,
            LAG(end_date) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date) AS prev_end
        FROM school_info
    )
    CONNECT BY school_id = PRIOR school_id
        AND start_date <= PRIOR end_date
        AND start_date > PRIOR start_date
    START WITH prev_end IS NULL OR start_date > prev_end
)
GROUP BY school_id, first_start

WITH "MaxHeightCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        MAX("height_cm") AS "max_height"
    FROM "superhero"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
),
"JoinedCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        s."id",
        s."superhero_name",
        s."alignment_id",
        s."publisher_id",
        s."height_cm",
        s."hair_colour_id"
    FROM "superhero" s
    JOIN "MaxHeightCTE" m
       ON s."alignment_id" = m."alignment_id"
      AND s."publisher_id" = m."publisher_id"
      AND s."height_cm"    = m."max_height"
),
"SumCTE" AS (
    SELECT
        "alignment_id",
        "publisher_id",
        SUM("hair_colour_id") AS "total_hair_colour"
    FROM "JoinedCTE"
    GROUP BY "alignment_id", "publisher_id"
)
SELECT
    j."id",
    j."superhero_name",
    j."alignment_id",
    j."publisher_id",
    j."height_cm" AS "max_height",
    j."hair_colour_id",
    s."total_hair_colour"
FROM "JoinedCTE" j
JOIN "SumCTE" s
   ON j."alignment_id" = s."alignment_id"
  AND j."publisher_id" = s."publisher_id"
ORDER BY
    j."alignment_id",
    j."publisher_id",
    j."id"

WITH map AS (
    SELECT
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(from_atom) AS begin_atom,
        to_atom                    AS end_atom,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT(start_date) AS path_start_date,
        end_date                   AS path_end_date,
        LEVEL
    FROM toxic_mappings
    WHERE CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF = 1
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE from_atom = PRIOR to_atom
)
SELECT
    begin_atom,
    end_atom,
    path_start_date,
    path_end_date AS end_date
FROM map
ORDER BY begin_atom, path_start_date

WITH atom_bonds AS (
    SELECT
        a."atom_id",
        a."molecule_id",
        a."element",
        LISTAGG(c."bond_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c."bond_id") AS connected_bonds
    FROM "atom" a
    LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    GROUP BY a."atom_id", a."molecule_id", a."element"
),
molecule_info AS (
    SELECT
        "molecule_id",
        "label"
    FROM "molecule"
)
SELECT
    ab."atom_id",
    ab."molecule_id",
    ab."element",
    mi."label",
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) AS bond_id,
    b."bond_type"
FROM atom_bonds ab
JOIN molecule_info mi ON ab."molecule_id" = mi."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON
    SUBSTR(ab.connected_bonds, 1, INSTR(ab.connected_bonds || ',', ',') - 1) = b."bond_id"
WHERE ab."atom_id" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ab."molecule_id", ab."atom_id"

WITH

set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
        FROM atom
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
    ),
    set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
        SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    ),

unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_a
    ),
    unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
            DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
        FROM set_b
    ),

molecule_hierarchy AS (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT molecule_id AS root_molecule,
            LEVEL AS hierarchy_level
        FROM molecule
        CONNECT BY PRIOR molecule_id = molecule_id
        START WITH label = '+'
    )
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b,
    LISTAGG(a.molecule_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.density_rank) AS matching_molecules,
    JSON_ARRAYAGG(
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule' VALUE a.molecule_id,
            'rank' VALUE a.density_rank
        )
        ORDER BY b.density_rank
    ) AS molecule_json
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
LEFT JOIN molecule_hierarchy h ON a.molecule_id = h.molecule_id
WHERE

EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    AND bond.bond_id = 'TR011_2_24'
)

AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND a1.element = a2.element
    )
GROUP BY
    GROUPING SETS (
        (a.density_rank, b.density_rank),
        ()
    )
HAVING
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id) > (
        SELECT AVG(element_count)
        FROM set_a
    )

SELECT "molecule_id", LISTAGG("element", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "element") AS "elements"
FROM "atom"
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

SELECT "molecule_id",
       LISTAGG(DISTINCT "atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "atom_id") AS "atom_ids"
FROM "atom"
WHERE "molecule_id" = 'TR011'
GROUP BY "molecule_id"

WITH "data" ("value") AS
  (SELECT '111,2,3 | 112,4,5 | 113,6,7'
   FROM dual),
     "hero_attributes" ("value",
                        "i",
                        "max_i",
                        "hero_id",
                        "attribute_id",
                        "attribute_value") AS
  (SELECT "value",
          1,
          REGEXP_COUNT("value", '[^|]+'),
          TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '[^|]+', 1, 1)),
          NULL,
          NULL
   FROM "data"
   UNION ALL SELECT "value",
                    "i" + 1,
                    "max_i",
                    TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("value", '[^|]+', 1, "i" + 1)),
                    NULL,
                    NULL
   FROM "hero_attributes"
   WHERE "i" < "max_i")
SELECT "i",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("hero_id", '[^,]+', 1, 1) AS "hero_id",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("hero_id", '[^,]+', 1, 2) AS "attribute_id",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("hero_id", '[^,]+', 1, 3) AS "attribute_value"
FROM "hero_attributes"
WHERE REGEXP_SUBSTR("hero_id", '[^,]+', 1, 2) = '5'

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP)) +
        EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP))/60 AS hour_of_day,
        TRUNC("date") AS match_date
    FROM "Match"
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    dc.match_date + dc.target_hour/24 AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    (dc."date" - dc.match_date) * 24 AS actual_hours,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY dc.match_date, dc.time_period
        ORDER BY dc.time_distance, dc."match_api_id"
    ) AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank <= 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        COUNT(*) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(element), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        LEVEL AS bond_depth,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(bond_id, '/') AS bond_path
    FROM bond
    START WITH bond_id LIKE '%\_2\_%' ESCAPE '\'
    CONNECT BY PRIOR bond_id = SUBSTR(bond_id, 1, INSTR(bond_id, '_', 1, 2) - 1) || '_' || 
                            TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(PRIOR bond_id, 
                                                    INSTR(PRIOR bond_id, '_', 1, 2) + 1)) + 1)
),
molecule_json AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        JSON_OBJECT(
            'molecule_id' VALUE m.molecule_id,
            'label' VALUE TO_CHAR(m.label),
            'atoms' VALUE (
                SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                    JSON_OBJECT(
                        'atom_id' VALUE a.atom_id,
                        'element' VALUE TO_CHAR(a.element)
                    )
                    ORDER BY a.atom_id
                )
                FROM atom a
                WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
            )
        ) AS molecule_data
    FROM molecule m
)
SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    c.atom_id2,
    stats.atom_count,
    stats.elements,
    CASE 
        WHEN JSON_EXISTS(mj.molecule_data, '$.atoms[*]?(@.element == "cl")') THEN 'Contains Chlorine'
        ELSE 'No Chlorine'
    END AS contains_cl,
    bh.bond_depth,
    bh.bond_path
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats stats ON m.molecule_id = stats.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_json mj ON m.molecule_id = mj.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
WHERE 
    (m.label IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM atom a2 
        WHERE a2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
        GROUP BY a2.molecule_id 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
    ))
    AND c.atom_id2 IN (
        SELECT a3.atom_id 
        FROM atom a3 
        WHERE TO_CHAR(a3.element) = DECODE(TO_CHAR(a.element), 'cl', 'cl', 'h', 'o', 'o', 'h', TO_CHAR(a.element))
    )
ORDER BY 
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    COALESCE(TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(b.bond_id, '[0-9]+', 1, 2) DEFAULT NULL ON CONVERSION), 0)

WITH match_dates AS
  (SELECT "id",
          "date" AS match_datetime,
          TO_CHAR("date", 'Day', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=English') AS day_of_week,
          TRUNC("date") + INTERVAL '7:30' HOUR TO MINUTE AS workday_start,
          TRUNC("date") + INTERVAL '17:00' HOUR TO MINUTE AS workday_end,
          "date" AS match_start_time,
          "date" + INTERVAL '2' HOUR AS match_end_time
   FROM "Match")
SELECT m."id",
       m.match_datetime,
       m.day_of_week,
       ROUND(GREATEST(LEAST(m.match_end_time, m.workday_end) - GREATEST(m.match_start_time, m.workday_start), 0) * 24 * 60) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM match_dates m
WHERE TRIM(m.day_of_week) IN ('Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday')

WITH "t" AS
  (SELECT 1 AS "from_hour",
          4 AS "to_hour",
          20 AS "pay"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 5 AS "from_hour",
                    8 AS "to_hour",
                    50 AS "pay"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 10 AS "from_hour",
                    12 AS "to_hour",
                    100 AS "pay"
   FROM dual),
     "input_data" AS
  (SELECT 6 AS "user_hours"
   FROM dual)
SELECT "i"."user_hours",
       SUM(GREATEST(0, LEAST("i"."user_hours", "t"."to_hour") - "t"."from_hour" + 1) * "t"."pay") AS "sum_to_pay"
FROM "input_data" "i"
CROSS JOIN "t"
WHERE "i"."user_hours" >= "t"."from_hour"
GROUP BY "i"."user_hours"

WITH molecule_atoms AS (
    SELECT m.molecule_id,
           a.atom_id,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
)
SELECT ma.molecule_id,
       ma.atom_id AS first_atom_id
FROM molecule_atoms ma
WHERE ma.atom_rank = 1
ORDER BY ma.molecule_id

WITH molecule_hierarchy (
    molecule_id,
    label,
    atom_id,
    element,
    atom_id2,
    bond_id,
    bond_type,
    level,
    path
) AS (
  -- Anchor member: start with molecules containing chlorine atoms
  SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
    CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
    CAST(NULL AS NCLOB) AS bond_type,
    1 AS level,
    CAST(m.molecule_id AS VARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
  FROM molecule m
  JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
  WHERE a.element = 'cl'
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive member: follow connections to other atoms
  SELECT
    mh.molecule_id,
    mh.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    c.atom_id2,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    mh.level + 1,
    mh.path || '->' || a.atom_id
  FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
  JOIN connected c ON mh.atom_id = c.atom_id
  JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
  JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
  WHERE mh.level < 3
    AND mh.atom_id2 IS NULL  -- Only expand from anchor rows, not already expanded rows
    AND INSTR(mh.path, a.atom_id) = 0  -- Cycle detection: don't revisit atoms
)
SELECT
  molecule_id,
  label,
  atom_id,
  element,
  atom_id2,
  bond_id,
  bond_type
FROM molecule_hierarchy
WHERE atom_id2 IS NOT NULL  -- Only return rows with connection information
ORDER BY
  molecule_id,
  atom_id,
  atom_id2

WITH team_matches AS (
    SELECT "home_team_api_id" AS "team_api_id", "date", 
           CASE WHEN "home_team_goal" > "away_team_goal" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "is_win"
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "home_team_api_id" IS NOT NULL AND "date" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT "away_team_api_id" AS "team_api_id", "date",
           CASE WHEN "away_team_goal" > "home_team_goal" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "is_win"
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "away_team_api_id" IS NOT NULL AND "date" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT "team_api_id", "start_date", "end_date", "match_count"
FROM team_matches MATCH_RECOGNIZE (
    PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
    ORDER BY "date"
    MEASURES 
        FIRST("date") AS "start_date",
        LAST("date") AS "end_date",
        COUNT(*) AS "match_count"
    PATTERN (win+)
    DEFINE win AS "is_win" = 1
)

SELECT SUBSTR("date", 1, 4) || SUBSTR("date", 6, 2) || SUBSTR("date", 8) AS "updated_value"
FROM "Team_Attributes"
WHERE "date" LIKE '%.%'

SELECT m.molecule_id,
       m.label,
       a.atom_id,
       a.element,
       b.bond_id,
       b.bond_type
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
ORDER BY m.molecule_id,
         a.atom_id,
         b.bond_id

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
       CASE
           WHEN COUNT(a."atom_id") > 0 THEN
               LISTAGG(a."atom_id", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id")
           ELSE 'No atoms'
       END AS "atom_ids",
       JSON_ARRAYAGG(
           JSON_OBJECT(
               'atom_id' VALUE a."atom_id",
               'element' VALUE a."element"
           ) ORDER BY a."atom_id"
       ) AS atom_json
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
HAVING MIN(a."element") IS NULL OR MIN(a."element") != 'h'
ORDER BY COUNT(a."atom_id") DESC NULLS LAST

WITH ranked_atoms AS (
    SELECT
        "atom_id",
        "molecule_id",
        "element",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "molecule_id" ORDER BY "atom_id") AS atom_rank
    FROM "atom"
)
SELECT
    "atom_id",
    "molecule_id",
    "element",
    atom_rank
FROM ranked_atoms
WHERE atom_rank <= 2
ORDER BY "molecule_id", atom_rank

SELECT "id",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("date", '[^ ]+', 1, LEVEL) AS "date_part"
FROM "Team_Attributes" t
CONNECT BY LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(t."date", '[^ ]+')
AND PRIOR t."id" = t."id"
AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    "team_api_id",
    "date",
    old_value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS level,
    new_value
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        LAG("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date") AS old_value,
        "buildUpPlaySpeed" AS new_value
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
)
WHERE old_value IS NOT NULL 
  AND old_value != new_value
ORDER BY "team_api_id", "date"

SELECT SUBSTR("CDSCode", 1, INSTR("CDSCode", '.', -1) - 1) AS "output"
FROM "CALIFORNIA_SCHOOLS"."schools"
WHERE "CDSCode" = '1110.400000.8001382'

WITH month_generator AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS month_start_date,
        1 AS month_num
    FROM dual
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        ADD_MONTHS(month_start_date, 1),
        month_num + 1
    FROM month_generator
    WHERE month_num < 12
),
atom_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        CONNECT_BY_ROOT a.atom_id AS root_atom_id,
        LEVEL AS hierarchy_level,
        SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(a.atom_id, '/') AS atom_path
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    START WITH c.atom_id IN (
        SELECT MIN(atom_id) FROM atom GROUP BY molecule_id
    )
    CONNECT BY NOCYCLE
        PRIOR c.atom_id2 = c.atom_id
        AND PRIOR a.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    mg.month_start_date,
    ah.molecule_id,
    ah.atom_id,
    ah.element,
    ah.hierarchy_level,
    ah.atom_path
FROM month_generator mg
CROSS JOIN atom_hierarchy ah
WHERE mg.month_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('01/01/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
                              AND TO_DATE('12/31/2018', 'MM/DD/YYYY')
ORDER BY
    mg.month_start_date,
    ah.molecule_id,
    ah.hierarchy_level,
    ah.atom_id

WITH "my_table" AS
  (SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
          1 AS "nif",
          'A1' AS "file_",
          5 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'A2' AS "file_",
                    3 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    2 AS "nif",
                    'A3' AS "file_",
                    2 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
                    2 AS "nif",
                    'A4' AS "file_",
                    1 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'B1' AS "file_",
                    4 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B' AS "cto",
                    1 AS "nif",
                    'B2' AS "file_",
                    6 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual),
"ranked_data" AS
  (SELECT t.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto"
                             ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("file_", 2))) AS "rn"
   FROM "my_table" t),
"first_match" AS
  (SELECT "cto",
          "nif",
          "file_",
          "filesize",
          "rn",
          MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
          SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
   FROM "ranked_data"
   MATCH_RECOGNIZE(
     PARTITION BY "cto"
     ORDER BY "rn"
     MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
              SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
     ALL ROWS PER MATCH
     PATTERN (group_start same_nif*)
     DEFINE group_start AS 1=1,
            same_nif AS "nif" = FIRST("nif") AND SUM("filesize") <= 10
   ))
SELECT "cto",
       "nif",
       "file_",
       "partition",
       "mn" - "first_mn" + 1 AS "subpartition",
       "total_size"
FROM
  (SELECT "cto",
          "nif",
          "file_",
          "filesize",
          "rn",
          "mn",
          "total_size"
   FROM "first_match") 
MATCH_RECOGNIZE(
  PARTITION BY "cto"
  ORDER BY "rn"
  MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition",
           FIRST("mn") AS "first_mn",
           "mn" AS "mn",
           "total_size" AS "total_size",
           "nif" AS "nif",
           "file_" AS "file_"
  ALL ROWS PER MATCH
  PATTERN (subgroup+)
  DEFINE subgroup AS "mn" - FIRST("mn") < 7
)

WITH tbl AS
  (SELECT TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS act_date
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
   FROM dual),
     months AS
  (SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS month_label,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS month_code
   FROM tbl t),
     grid AS
  (SELECT m1.month_label AS activation_month,
          m1.month_code AS rn_1,
          m2.month_label AS act_month,
          m2.month_code AS rn_2
   FROM months m1
   CROSS JOIN months m2
   WHERE m1.month_code <= m2.month_code),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT DISTINCT m."molecule_id",
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_month_code
   FROM tbl t
   CROSS JOIN 
     (SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id" FROM "bond"
      UNION
      SELECT DISTINCT "molecule_id" FROM "atom") m),
     monthly_counts AS
  (SELECT act_month_code,
          COUNT(DISTINCT "molecule_id") AS molecule_count
   FROM molecule_activity
   GROUP BY act_month_code),
     cumulative_counts AS
  (SELECT g.activation_month,
          g.act_month,
          g.rn_1,
          g.rn_2,
          SUM(CASE WHEN mc.act_month_code = g.rn_2 THEN mc.molecule_count ELSE 0 END) AS current_month_count,
          SUM(CASE WHEN mc.act_month_code BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2 THEN mc.molecule_count ELSE 0 END) AS cumulative_count
   FROM grid g
   LEFT JOIN monthly_counts mc ON mc.act_month_code BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2
   GROUP BY g.activation_month, g.act_month, g.rn_1, g.rn_2)
SELECT activation_month,
       act_month,
       CASE WHEN rn_1 = rn_2 THEN current_month_count ELSE cumulative_count END AS active_molecules
FROM cumulative_counts
ORDER BY rn_1, rn_2

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"matched_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        G."ID",
        G."GROUPCHOICE",
        G."DATECHOICE",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN
    FROM "grp_choices" G
    JOIN "credits" C ON G."ID" = C."ID" AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    "ID",
    "GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN "ARTCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN "BIZCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN "HUMCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN "NATCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN "TEKCRED"
        WHEN "GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN "GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "TOTAL_CREDITS"
FROM "matched_credits"
WHERE RN = 1
ORDER BY "ID", "GROUPCHOICE"

SELECT 
    "molecule_id",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "molecule_id" ORDER BY "atom_id") AS atom_number
FROM "atom"

SELECT "team_api_id",
       "buildUpPlaySpeed",
       "date"
FROM
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          "buildUpPlaySpeed",
          "date",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
                             ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS seq
   FROM "Team_Attributes")
WHERE seq = 1

WITH latest_player_attributes AS (
    SELECT
        pa.player_api_id,
        pa.overall_rating,
        pa.preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pa.player_api_id ORDER BY pa.date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
)
SELECT
    p.player_api_id AS player_id,
    p.player_name AS name,
    lpa.overall_rating AS rating,
    lpa.preferred_foot AS preferred_foot
FROM Player p
LEFT JOIN latest_player_attributes lpa
    ON p.player_api_id = lpa.player_api_id
    AND lpa.rn = 1
WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(lpa.overall_rating, 0) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        "ht"."team_long_name" AS "home_team",
        "at"."team_long_name" AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", "m"."season"
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        COUNT(*) AS "total_matches",
        SUM(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "goals_scored",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS
  (SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'DUMMY' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL),
     "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS
  (SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
          1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'NOTIONALDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    3 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL)
SELECT "TECHNICAL_ID",
       "ASSET_TYPE"
FROM
  (SELECT X."TECHNICAL_ID",
          X."ASSET_TYPE",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY X."TECHNICAL_ID"
                             ORDER BY MRAT."PRIORITY") AS "rn"
   FROM "MY_TABLE" X
   INNER JOIN "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" MRAT ON X."ASSET_TYPE" = MRAT."ASSET_TYPE"
   WHERE MRAT."APPLICATION" = 'SW')
WHERE "rn" = 1

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           m."season",
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."season") AS season_count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(l."name", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY l."name") AS leagues_played
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md."country_id", md."date", md.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN match_summary ms ON cs.country_id = ms."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT a.atom_id,
       a.molecule_id,
       a.element,
       c.bond_id,
       CASE
           WHEN b.bond_type IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
           ELSE b.bond_type
       END AS bond_type
FROM "atom" a
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "molecule" m
    WHERE m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
)
ORDER BY a.atom_id

SELECT "m"."id",
       "m"."date",
       "t"."team_api_id",
       CASE WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "is_home_team",
       "m"."home_team_api_id",
       "m"."away_team_api_id",
       "m"."home_team_goal",
       "m"."away_team_goal",
       CASE 
           WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
           ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
       END AS "match_goal_difference",
       SUM(CASE 
               WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
               ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
           END) OVER (PARTITION BY "t"."team_api_id" ORDER BY "m"."date", "m"."id") AS "cumulative_goal_difference"
FROM "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN "Team" "t" 
    ON ("m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id")
WHERE "m"."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY "t"."team_api_id", "m"."date", "m"."id"

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM bond
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_type) AS bond_type_rank
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m.molecule_id = ast.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m.molecule_id = mc.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN (SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",
       T."team_short_name",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeed",
       TA."buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
       TA."chanceCreationShooting",
       TA."chanceCreationShootingClass",
       TA."defencePressure",
       TA."defencePressureClass"
FROM "Team" T
INNER JOIN "Team_Attributes" TA ON T."team_api_id" = TA."team_api_id"
WHERE TA."date" = TO_DATE('2013-09-20', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT "valid_from",
       "valid_until",
       "count"
FROM
  (SELECT "dt" AS "valid_from",
          LEAD("dt", 1, NULL) OVER (ORDER BY "dt") - INTERVAL '1' DAY AS "valid_until",
          SUM("cnt") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") AS "count"
   FROM
     (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "dt",
             1 AS "cnt"
      FROM DUAL
      UNION ALL
      SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "dt",
             1 AS "cnt"
      FROM DUAL))
WHERE "count" > 0
  AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until"
       OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

DECLARE
    v_molecule_id NVARCHAR2(512);
    v_label NCLOB;
    v_atom_id NVARCHAR2(512);
    v_element NCLOB;
    v_atom_id2 NVARCHAR2(512);
    v_bond_id NVARCHAR2(512);
    v_bond_type NCLOB;
BEGIN
    SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
           "m"."label",
           "a"."atom_id",
           "a"."element",
           "c"."atom_id2",
           "b"."bond_id",
           "b"."bond_type"
    INTO v_molecule_id,
         v_label,
         v_atom_id,
         v_element,
         v_atom_id2,
         v_bond_id,
         v_bond_type
    FROM "molecule" "m"
    INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
    INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
    INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
    WHERE ROWNUM = 1
    ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
             "a"."atom_id",
             "c"."atom_id2";
END

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(s."County", 1, INSTR(s."County", ' ') - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(s."LastUpdate", 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM, 24), 2, '0') || ':' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM * 7, 60), 2, '0'),
           'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "col4"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE s."StatusType" = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'yyyy/mm/dd hh24:mi')
),
deduplicated_data AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    fd."col2",
    fd."col3"
  FROM filtered_data fd
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    dd."col2",
    LISTAGG(dd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dd."col3") AS "col3_list",
    COUNT(DISTINCT dd."col3") AS "distinct_count"
  FROM deduplicated_data dd
  GROUP BY dd."col2"
),
record_counts AS (
  SELECT
    fd."col2",
    COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
  FROM filtered_data fd
  GROUP BY fd."col2"
)

SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  rc."record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
JOIN record_counts rc ON rc."col2" = ad."col2"
ORDER BY rc."record_count" DESC

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "c"."atom_id2",
         "b"."bond_type"

WITH atom_elements AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        a.element,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS element_rank
    FROM atom a
),
bond_details AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        b.bond_type,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY b.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_id) AS bond_rank
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_connections AS (
    SELECT
        c.atom_id,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        LISTAGG(c.atom_id2, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.atom_id2) OVER (PARTITION BY c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms
    FROM connected c
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    ae.atom_id,
    ae.element,
    bd.bond_id,
    bd.bond_type,
    mc.connected_atoms
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_elements ae ON m.molecule_id = ae.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connections mc ON ae.atom_id = mc.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond_details bd ON mc.bond_id = bd.bond_id
WHERE ae.element_rank <= 10
  AND (bd.bond_rank <= 5 OR bd.bond_rank IS NULL)
  AND (m.label IS NULL OR m.label IN ('+', '-'))
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    ae.atom_id,
    bd.bond_id

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id")
    END
INTO :result_variable
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "bond_id", "atom_id" AS atom_ref FROM "connected"
    UNION
    SELECT "bond_id", "atom_id2" AS atom_ref FROM "connected"
) c ON a."atom_id" = c.atom_ref
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
WHERE m."molecule_id" = :specific_molecule_id

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM bond b
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id AS molecule_id,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS atom_count,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS bond_count
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m.molecule_id = ac.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m.molecule_id = bc.molecule_id

WITH atom_data AS (
    SELECT
        a.atom_id,
        a.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN UPPER(a.element)
            ELSE a.element
        END AS element
    FROM atom a
),
bond_data AS (
    SELECT
        b.bond_id,
        b.molecule_id,
        CASE
            WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 'single'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '=' THEN 'double'
            WHEN b.bond_type = '#' THEN 'triple'
            ELSE b.bond_type
        END AS bond_type
    FROM bond b
),
molecule_elements AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom_data a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(a.atom_id, b.bond_id) AS "id",
    COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type) AS "val",
    me.elements AS molecule_composition
FROM atom_data a
FULL OUTER JOIN bond_data b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_elements me ON COALESCE(a.molecule_id, b.molecule_id) = me.molecule_id
WHERE (a.atom_id IS NOT NULL OR b.bond_id IS NOT NULL)
  AND (
      me.elements LIKE '%cl%'
      OR me.elements IS NULL
      OR REGEXP_LIKE(COALESCE(a.element, b.bond_type), '^[a-zA-Z]+$')
  )
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN a.atom_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1
        ELSE 2
    END,
    "id",
    "molecule_id"

WITH "data" AS
  (SELECT 101 AS "id",
          'A' AS "type",
          10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    20 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'C' AS "type",
                    30 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual),
     "w_cnt" AS
  (SELECT "id",
          "part",
          COUNT(*) AS "cnt"
   FROM "data"
   WHERE "type" = 'B'
   GROUP BY "id",
            "part"
   HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT d."id",
       d."type",
       d."part"
FROM "data" d
INNER JOIN "w_cnt" w ON d."id" = w."id"
AND d."part" = w."part"
WHERE d."type" = 'B'

WITH RECURSIVE molecule_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        a.atom_id,
        a.element,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS atom_id2,
        CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_id,
        CAST(NULL AS NCLOB) AS bond_type,
        1 AS level,
        CAST(a.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(4000)) AS path
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        h.molecule_id,
        h.label,
        h.atom_id,
        h.element,
        c.atom_id2,
        c.bond_id,
        b.bond_type,
        h.level + 1,
        CAST(h.path || '->' || c.atom_id2 AS NVARCHAR2(4000))
    FROM molecule_hierarchy h
    JOIN connected c ON h.atom_id = c.atom_id
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE h.level < 3
    AND INSTR(h.path, c.atom_id2) = 0
),
pivoted_elements AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 1, element)) AS element1,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 2, element)) AS element2,
        MAX(DECODE(rn, 3, element)) AS element3
    FROM (
        SELECT
            molecule_id,
            element,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY atom_id) AS rn
        FROM atom
    )
    GROUP BY molecule_id
)

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    JSON_OBJECT(
        'element' VALUE a.element,
        'connected_atoms' VALUE (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'atom_id' VALUE c.atom_id2,
                    'bond_type' VALUE b.bond_type
                )
                ORDER BY c.atom_id2
            )
            FROM connected c
            LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
            WHERE c.atom_id = a.atom_id
        )
    ) AS atom_details,
    c.atom_id2,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    pe.element1,
    pe.element2,
    pe.element3,
    LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id) AS elements_list
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND m.molecule_id = SUBSTR(b.bond_id, 1, INSTR(b.bond_id, '_') - 1)
LEFT JOIN pivoted_elements pe ON m.molecule_id = pe.molecule_id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule_hierarchy mh
    WHERE mh.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    AND mh.level > 1
)
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id, c.atom_id2

WITH "columns" ("column_name") AS
  (SELECT 'CDSCode'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'StatusType'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'School'
   FROM dual),
     "column_exists" ("column_name",
                      "column_exists") AS
  (SELECT c."column_name",
          NVL2(a."column_name", 'YES', 'NO')
   FROM "columns" c
   LEFT OUTER JOIN all_tab_columns a ON (a.table_name = 'SCHOOLS'
                                         AND c."column_name" = a."column_name"))
SELECT *
FROM "column_exists" PIVOT (MAX("column_exists")
                            FOR "column_name" IN ('CDSCode' AS "cdscode",
                                                  'StatusType' AS "statustype",
                                                  'School' AS "school"))

WITH replacements ("molecule_id", "label", "spos") AS
  (SELECT "molecule_id",
          "label",
          REGEXP_INSTR("label", '\+', 1, 1, 0)
   FROM "molecule"
   UNION ALL SELECT "molecule_id",
                    SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1),
                    REGEXP_INSTR(SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1), '\+', 1, 1, 0)
   FROM replacements
   WHERE "spos" > 0)
SELECT "molecule_id",
       "label"
FROM replacements
WHERE "spos" = 0

WITH "a" ("test") AS
  (SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details' FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|' FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16' FROM dual)
SELECT "test",
       REGEXP_SUBSTR("test", '^(([^|]*\|){0,4}[^|]*)') AS "res"
FROM "a"

SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    c."bond_id",
    b."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
WHERE a."atom_id" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN m."label" = '+' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    c."bond_id"

WITH molecule_pairs AS (
    SELECT 'TR427' AS mol_id1, 'TR430' AS mol_id2 FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'TR427', 'TR431' FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'TR430', 'TR431' FROM DUAL
),
molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        m."label",
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "atom" a WHERE a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id") AS atom_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") FROM "bond" b WHERE b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id") AS bond_count,
        (SELECT LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY a."element")
         FROM "atom" a WHERE a."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
)
SELECT
    m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
    m1."label" AS label1,
    m1.atom_count,
    m1.elements,
    m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2,
    m2."label" AS label2,
    m2.atom_count,
    m2.elements,
    CASE
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0 AND m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Both have bonds'
        WHEN m1.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m1."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        WHEN m2.bond_count > 0
        THEN 'Only ' || m2."molecule_id" || ' has bonds'
        ELSE 'Neither has bonds'
    END AS bond_status
FROM molecule_stats m1
JOIN molecule_pairs mp ON m1."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id1
JOIN molecule_stats m2 ON m2."molecule_id" = mp.mol_id2
ORDER BY
    m1."molecule_id",
    m2."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "b"."bond_type"

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, level) AS value,
           LEVEL AS position
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY level <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    JOIN string2_parsed s2 ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values

WITH t AS
  (SELECT "date",
          "match_api_id" AS code,
          TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) AS cnt,
          MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id") AS min_dur
   FROM "Match")
SELECT t."date",
       t.code,
       t.duration,
       CASE
           WHEN t.min_dur = 0
                OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
       END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE t."date" = DATE '2008-11-22'

GRANT SELECT ON molecule TO your_user;
GRANT SELECT ON atom TO your_user

SELECT b."bond_id",
       b."molecule_id",
       b."bond_type",
       GREATEST(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1, 'MM') + 1, m.months), SYSDATE) AS bond_formation_date
FROM "bond" b
CROSS JOIN
  (SELECT level AS months
   FROM dual CONNECT BY level <= 5) m
WHERE b."molecule_id" = 'TR011'

SELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG(
    country_key VALUE match_array
    RETURNING CLOB
) AS JSON
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'country_id' || "country_id" AS country_key,
        JSON_ARRAYAGG(
            JSON_OBJECT(
                'date' VALUE "date",
                'home_team_goal' VALUE "home_team_goal",
                'away_team_goal' VALUE "away_team_goal"
                RETURNING CLOB
            )
            RETURNING CLOB
        ) AS match_array
    FROM "Match"
    GROUP BY "country_id"
)

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."element") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            a."element",
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", a."element"
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_type") AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN a."element" = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN a."element" = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN a."element" = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE a."element"
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT m."molecule_id",
           COUNT(a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
           LISTAGG(a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
bond_stats AS (
    SELECT b."molecule_id",
           COUNT(b."bond_id") AS bond_count
    FROM "bond" b
    GROUP BY b."molecule_id"
)
SELECT ms."molecule_id",
       ms.atom_count AS "total_atoms",
       bs.bond_count,
       CASE
           WHEN ms.atom_count > 0 THEN
               ROUND(bs.bond_count / ms.atom_count, 2)
           ELSE 0
       END AS bonds_per_atom,
       ms.elements
FROM molecule_stats ms
LEFT JOIN bond_stats bs ON ms."molecule_id" = bs."molecule_id"
WHERE ms.elements LIKE '%cl%'
ORDER BY ms."molecule_id"

WITH team_speed_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "team_api_id",
        "date",
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        "buildUpPlaySpeedClass",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) as rn
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
),
match_details AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."id",
        "m"."date",
        "m"."home_team_api_id",
        "m"."away_team_api_id",
        "m"."home_team_goal",
        "m"."away_team_goal",
        "t"."team_long_name" as home_team_name,
        "t2"."team_long_name" as away_team_name,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as home_speed,
        "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeedClass" as home_speed_class,
        "ta_away"."buildUpPlaySpeed" as away_speed
    FROM "Match" "m"
    JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team" "t2" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t2"."team_api_id"
    JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta"."date" <= "m"."date"
    LEFT JOIN "Team_Attributes" "ta_away" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "ta_away"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta_away"."date" <= "m"."date"
    JOIN team_speed_stats "ts" ON "ta"."team_api_id" = "ts"."team_api_id"
        AND "ta"."date" = "ts"."date"
        AND "ts"."rn" = 1
    WHERE "m"."date" BETWEEN TO_DATE('2015-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2016-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
),
overall_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed") as overall_avg_speed
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
    WHERE "date" BETWEEN (SELECT MIN("date") FROM match_details) 
                     AND (SELECT MAX("date") FROM match_details)
)
SELECT
    "md"."id",
    "md"."date",
    "md"."home_team_api_id",
    "md"."away_team_api_id",
    "md"."home_team_goal",
    "md"."away_team_goal",
    "md"."home_team_name",
    "md"."away_team_name",
    "md"."home_speed",
    "md"."home_speed_class",
    "md"."away_speed",
    CASE
        WHEN "md"."home_speed" > "oa"."overall_avg_speed" THEN 'Above Overall Average'
        ELSE 'Below or Equal to Overall Average'
    END as speed_comparison
FROM match_details "md"
CROSS JOIN overall_avg "oa"
WHERE "md"."home_speed" > "oa"."overall_avg_speed"
ORDER BY "md"."home_team_goal" DESC, "md"."away_team_goal" ASC

with lose_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2011 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_5,
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2012 then "defencePressure"
              end) as lose_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id"),
     profit_agg as
  (select "team_api_id",
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2011 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_5,
          sum(case
                  when extract(year from "date") = 2012 then "buildUpPlaySpeed"
              end) as profit_10
   from "Team_Attributes"
   group by "team_api_id")
select l.lose_5,
       p.profit_5,
       l.lose_10,
       p.profit_10,
       coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id") as "team_api_id"
from lose_agg l
full outer join profit_agg p on l."team_api_id" = p."team_api_id"
order by coalesce(p."team_api_id", l."team_api_id")
